chunks.title: Supplication for Mercy
chunks.reason: David pleads with Yahweh to stop reproof and wrath, asking for healing and rescue.

chunks.title: Reasons for Deliverance
chunks.reason: The psalmist argues that God is not remembered in death and describes his physical suffering.

chunks.title: Declaration of Confidence
chunks.reason: David speaks to his enemies, declaring that God has heard his prayer and they will be ashamed.
